chatter: Cheers, love! It's time to save the world.
I can't wait to get out there. Can you wait to get out there? Because I can't.
I got lucky with my call sign. Can you imagine if they'd call me Zippy? *giggle*
I have a need... for swiftness.
I've got a good feeling. This could be our best mission yet!
Keep moving out there - don't wanna give them any easy shots, do we?
Pre-mission checklist complete. Now it's time for the good bit.
Quick on our feet, hard to defeat!
Warm up those legs. We've got work to do.
Who's ready to rock out? *imitating guitar solo* Let's do this!
Season's greetings! Let's get this done. (while in Winter Wonderland event)
Don't worry! Genji and I have run loads of missions like this together. (with Genji on the team)
Hey! Reinhardt , Mercy , Torbjörn ... this is just like my first mission! (with Mercy , Reinhardt and Torbjörn on the team)
Look at us! The full might of Overwatch , reassembled and ready to rumble! (with Mercy , Reinhardt , Sojourn and Winston on the team)
Let's give it a bash, shall we?
Just need to win one more. We can manage that, right?
At least we're getting a free sightseeing tour!
Chin up, team, we'll win the next one!
It all comes down to this!
Whoever wins this, wins it all. That's exciting, isn't it?
And she's back in the game!
As they say, try try again!
Back again! Did you miss me?
Give up? Not in my vocabulary!
Let's try that one more time.
Let's not talk about that one. (eliminated by Mercy )
I always get there before everyone else...
I'm sure the reinforcements are coming.
Don't know when to stop, do ya?
Uh oh! Winston's angry! (witnessing Winston use Primal Rage)
call-outs: *giggle* Look out, world! Here I come!
Hang in there, this one's ours!
Hold out, everyone! We're almost there!
Hold strong, we've almost done it!
Stand firm for just a little while longer!
Let's get a move on and finish this!
Speed it up, loves! We're almost out of time!
Time's almost up! Let's show them one last push.
eliminations: No hard feelings, love! Ha ha!
You got what's coming to ya.
* laugh * I've been waiting for that! (against Talon member)
Manners maketh the man! (against male Talon member)
Time to ride into the sunset! (against Cassidy )
There can only be one top pilot! (against D.Va )
Really lost your way, haven't ya? (against Freja )
Chin up, Juno! There's always next time. (against Juno )
Hahah! Liked my smash hit? (against Lúcio )
Can't catch me, you big lug! (against Mauga )
That's enough out of you! (against Ramattra )
There's no peace to be had with you, is there? (against Ramattra )
Clocked out for the day, Sojo? (against Sojourn )
Hack your way out of that. (against Sombra )
No one likes a thief. (against Sombra )
So much for that paradox! (against another Tracer )
Ooh, sorry love! (against Venture or any female)
Hope you can forgive me, big guy! (against Winston )
It was beauty killed the beast. (against Winston )
Couldn't have been me. I'm way over here! (using Recall after throwing bomb)
That's not how you wanted that to go? (shutting down ultimate ability)
Still a fighter pilot at heart! (while airborne)
Whew! Just in the nick of time! (on low HP)
Can't outrun me! (against enemy using movement ability)
*machine gun sounds* We're kicking butt, Ana! (Nano-Boosted by Ana )
Ha! Not catching me this time! (against Doomfist using Seismic Slam)
A smart shot if there ever was one! (against Reinhardt using Charge)
Thanks, Doctor! That helped me concentrate. (against Sigma using Gravitic Flux)
Ooh, that looked like a wicked ride! (against enemy caught in Sigma 's Gravitic Flux)
I love hide 'n seek! (against Sombra using Stealth or Junkrat using Rip-Tire)
Don't blink, Mirror-me! (against another Tracer using Blink)
Now that's a fast fight! (against another Tracer using Blink)
Oh, really graceful, yeah, no, yeah. (against airborne Widowmaker )
How dare you come back here! (against Widowmaker on King's Row )
Sorry, Winston! You were gonna hurt someone! (against Winston using Primal Rage)
One for you, one for you... *laughs*
What time is it? Streak time.
Wait till I tell Em about that one!
Was that all of them? Stellar.
I don't start fights, but I always finish them.
Did you call for a hero?
I always come through in a pinch!
Thought you could use a hand.
A new meaning to crunch time! (on low HP?)
Blink. Smack. Repeat! (using Blink and quick melee in succession)
The old Blink-punch! (using Blink and quick melee in succession)
Zip, bop, bang! (using Blink and quick melee in succession)
Fast-paced fisticuffs! (using multiple Blinks and quick melee in succession)
Fist to face: extra fast! (using multiple Blinks and quick melee in succession)
Do you love autumn? Because you're falling!
Ha ha! Right off the edge.
We hope you enjoy your flight!
Couldn't have done it better myself!
I see you, and I like what I'm seeing!
Winston! You're an animal! * giggles * (to Winston )
interactions: Tracer : I don't know how you do it, Ana! Ana : Do what? Tracer : Stay still for hours, waiting for the perfect shot! Ana : I don't know how you zip around without getting dizzy.
Ashe : You need a dose of reality, little miss sunshine. Tracer : It doesn't hurt to look on the bright side. Ashe : 'Till the sun gets in your eyes.

Tracer : Am I glad to have you on our side and not Talon's! Baptiste : Glad to be here. Still not used to such good company. Tracer : You fit right in! Baptiste : *chuckle* Not so sure about that, but I try.
Bastion : *cheers, love beeps* Tracer : That... sounds awfully familiar.
Tracer : So, what have you been up to? Seeing anyone? Brigitte : Oh my gosh, Lena! Tracer : So... that's a no? *chuckle* Brigitte : I'll... tell you later.
Tracer : I still can't believe how tall you've gotten! Brigitte : And now, I can lift you with one arm! Tracer : You'll have to catch me first! *laugh*

Tracer : I heard you were a bounty hunter in the years after Overwatch went down. Cassidy : ...Who told you that? Tracer : Did you catch anybody good? Cassidy : My bills were always paid. I'll leave it at that.
Tracer : Can I please fly Tokki ? I'll be super careful! D.Va : Uh, didn't you lose an entire jet once? Tracer : *giggles* Not on purpose!
Tracer : Two hot shot pilots on the same team? D.Va : The bad guys won't know what hit 'em!

D.Va : How can you be good at shooting in real life, but so bad in games? Tracer : Mmm... it's not the same thing, I guess. D.Va : *sigh* It's lonely at the top. Tracer : I could beat you at the cooking games, though.
D.Va : You should visit me in Korea, Lena. Tracer : Oh, I'd love that! D.Va : I'll show you true hospitality, Korea style. Tracer : I smell shenanigans. Sign me up!
D.Va : I have to introduce you to Overlord ! He's the best pilot I know. Tracer : Don't sell yourself short! I've seen you in action.
Echo : I learn so much from observing you. Tracer : Aw, likewise! Wait, in a good way, right? Echo : Right? Tracer : Are you copying me? Echo : Me?
Kiriko : Genji, remember the time you tripped over your sword in training? Tracer : Ha! Is that true?! Genji : It only happened once. Kiriko : Once was enough.
Illari : I don't understand how you're always smiling. Tracer : Life always finds ways to get us down. But only I can choose to keep my spirits up.
Junkrat: Cheers love! It's time to save the world! Tracer: Oh, what? Again?
Tracer: It's a perfect day for some mayhem! Junkrat: That's what I am always sayin'!
Junkrat : Peter Piper picked a pepp-- No. Peter Piper pecked a-- UGH! Kiriko : Are you people always this loud? Tracer : He's not with us!

Juno: How did you and Winston even find me? I wandered so far from my landing sight. Tracer: We just had to ask the locals. Not everyday a Martian drops out of the sky! Juno: *embarrassed laugh* I suppose it must have been a spectacle...!
Tracer : Good thing your drop-pod had those parachutes. Would have been a right nasty crash without them! Juno : They were my father's design. He promised they would keep me safe.
Tracer : A friend of mine has a massive collection of vintage vinyl. Lúcio : That's sick! If they want, I can send them some stuff too. Tracer : Iggy would love that!

Tracer : Iggy tells me you kept in touch after your little record trade. Lúcio : Yeah! We've been vibing our about your favorite tunes. She's got great tastes! Tracer : *giggles* Great taste in DJ's, too! Lúcio : You think so? *clears throat* That's... t-that'd be somethin' else.
Lúcio : All right. Let's hear that fighting spirit! Tracer : Rarrr! Lúcio : That's exactly what I'm talking about! Woo!

Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Tracer : Cheetah. No, uh, lion! Oh, wait, uh... Gorilla! Oh, no, sorry, Winston ... Umm... Oh! I think it's a falcon, it's got to be. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!

Tracer : What's the most crazy thing you've seen as a doctor? Mercy : Well, there was one pilot who was lost in time. Tracer : Aaaah, right... *laughs* That was an adventure! Sorry about that! Mercy : Don't be. You were worth it.
Moira : It seems your little band is back together. For the moment, at least. Tracer : Overwatch is here to stay. And we're coming for you next.

Tracer : You're not exactly built for speed, Orisa. How do you catch someone who's running away? Orisa : I will provide a demonstration. Start running. Tracer : Uhh... Actually, I think I'll take your word for it!

Sigma : You were lost to time... Tell me: Do you hear it, too? Tracer : Well. I got a bit of a ring in my ears, I guess! Sigma : Can't you make it out? The faintest, maddening melody? Tracer : Uh... We should really stay focused.
Sojourn : You're sitting out the next mission, Oxton. Emily made me promise you'd take it easy. Tracer : Maybe you could look the other way this time? Sojourn : And get on her bad side? Not a chance.

Tracer : Ugh. Entered my passcode too quick and now I'm locked out of my phone! Sombra : I can unlock it for you, cariño. Tracer : Thanks, love! Oh-- wait. You tryna pull a fast one on me? Sombra : Hm. You're smarter than you look.

Tracer : Think you could spiff up my chronal accelerator with hard light? Symmetra : Potentially. Are you envisioning something in particular? Tracer : How about... a falcon that flaps its wings when I run? Maybe... a plane that does a barrel roll when I dodge? What about... a record that spins when I recall? Symmetra : That is doable. I will send you a quote.

Venture : Uh, hey, so... What's the deal with your whole... "blinking" thing? Tracer : Well, Winston describes it as "localized time travel". Venture : Time travel? Like... you can go back in time and be there for when they laid the first brick of the Great Pyramid of Giza?! Tracer : Not... exactly. But, I guess I've never tried.
Tracer : I have to work with you! Widowmaker : Babysitting is not part of my services. Tracer : That's a relief. Who'd trust you with a baby?!
Winston : So, uh... I noticed you don't send me bananas anymore. Tracer : You said you didn't want any! *laugh*
Winston : Here's another one! What sickness do pilot usually get? Tracer : Ooh-- airsick? Winston : The flew! Tracer : Ohoho! That was a pretty good one!

Winston : I got you a present, Lena! But you can't unwrap it until after the mission. Tracer : Ooh, what is it? Winston : Wha-- I'm not going to tell you! Tracer : Oh, please, Winston? Please? *chuckle* Just a little hint! Winston : Absolutely not!
Tracer : You sure know how to bring people together! Zarya : And you know how to blow them up!

One of three: Reinhardt: What did you do, you know, before the Crisis? Tracer: Tekartha Zenyatta? If you don't mind me asking.... what did you do before the Crisis? Zarya: What was your function before the Crisis? Zenyatta: I collected payments at a laser tag arena. I was a lifeguard at a water park. I served coffee. I drove a tractor. I massaged sheep on a free-range pasture. One of seven: D.Va: Wait, for real? Doomfist: Is that true? Roadhog: Really? Reinhardt: Hahahaha, is that true? Sigma: Could that be? Tracer: Seriously? Zarya: Really? One of two: Genji: He won't tell me either. Ramattra: Ha! I don't think so, but he wouldn't tell me either.
map-specific: What beautiful weather! Ooh, did I bring my sun cream...?
Ooh, this place gives me the heebie jeebies!!
Wanna see me run around the shuttle? Wanna see me do it again?
How dare you come back here?! (eliminating Widowmaker )
The Big Apple! Someone take my picture!
Welcome to Rio, ladies and gentlemen!
Can't believe Anubis is just... here. After all the pain it caused.
